treatments.description: Big, punchy 3–5 word captions with per-word highlight. Minimal decorations.
use_when: When you want maximum readability and minimal template noise
avoid_when: You explicitly want branded stickers/title cards
You need a cutout/greenscreen background replacement

treatments.description: Hormozi big words with a semi-transparent rounded-rect plate behind the caption for extra contrast.
use_when: You want a clean, premium caption look
avoid_when: You want a very minimal/no-box look

treatments.description: Kinetic captions + optional title + optional PNG/SVG stickers/logos. No background replacement.
use_when: You have a real title for the clip and want a branded top header
avoid_when: Generic podcasts where stickers feel random

treatments.description: Background blur/replace + subject cutout + halo + lightwrap. Great when matte quality is strong.
use_when: Product/fashion/travel where subject separation adds production value
avoid_when: Matte is noisy (hair/hand edges) or subject fills the frame
Low quality masks (will look worse than no effect)
